name: BITS Transfer Job Downloading File Potential Suspicious Extension
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: BITS Transfer Job Downloading File Potential Suspicious Extension
SIGMA Description: Detects new BITS transfer job saving local files with potential suspicious extensions

False positives:
- While the file extensions in question can be suspicious at times. It's best to add filters according to your environment to avoid large amount false positives

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=16403 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.bat%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.dll%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.hta%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.ps1%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.psd1%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.sh%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.vbe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.vbs%')) AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\appdata*%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.com%'))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BITS Transfer Job Downloading File Potential Suspicious Extension on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=16403 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.bat%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.dll%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.hta%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.ps1%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.psd1%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.sh%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.vbe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.vbs%')) AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\appdata*%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.com%'))) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: BITS Transfer Job Downloading File Potential Suspicious Extension
